Libra is the 9th sign to Aquarius which is also West.
The important principle of Nadi Astrology based on
directional aspects is that, all the planets posited in Zodiacal signs
representing the same direction are taken to be in conjunction
to one another. It is

18 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
WHY 3rd and 7th Aspects are taken?
The 3rd and the 7th signs from the sign in which a planet
is posited are of the opposite direction.
Ex :-Suppose Jupiter is in Gemini (in the West) the opposite
sign that is the 7th sign Sagittarius is in the East. Hence the
importance for the 7th aspect of the planets.
Regarding the 3rd aspect
3rd sign :from the sign in which a planet is posited also
represents the opposite sign.
